about.title: About
about.tagline: Serving the Muslim community upon the Quran and Sunnah, with the understanding of the pious predecessors.
about.aboutMasjid:
The Salafi Masjid is a place of worship and learning dedicated to teaching authentic Islam based upon the Quran and the Sunnah, with the understanding of the Salaf us-Saalih (the pious predecessors). We strive to provide a welcoming environment for all Muslims seeking knowledge and community.

Our masjid hosts regular prayers, weekly lessons, lectures from visiting scholars, Quran school, and community events for men, women, and youth.
about.aboutApp:
The Salafi Masjid App keeps you connected with your community. View daily prayer and jama'ah times, receive announcements directly from the masjid, and stay up to date with upcoming lessons, lectures, and events.

Prayer times are based on the masjid's published timetable with Aladhan API as a fallback for calculated times.
about.credits:
Prayer time calculations powered by the Aladhan API.
Built with Expo and React Native.
about.footer: May Allah accept this effort and make it a benefit for the Muslim community.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The Salafi Masjid App is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your data. We collect only what is necessary to provide you with prayer times, announcements, and event information.
privacy.dataCollection: When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, and an encrypted password. We do not collect your location unless you grant permission, and only to calculate prayer times for your area. We store your notification preferences and app settings locally on your device.
privacy.howWeUse: Your account information is used solely to authenticate you and deliver personalised content such as announcements and event notifications from The Salafi Masjid. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.dataStorage: Your data is stored securely on our servers hosted on Digital Ocean. Passwords are hashed and never stored in plain text. Communication between the app and our servers is encrypted using HTTPS. Local data such as cached prayer times and preferences are stored on your device.
privacy.thirdParty:
We use the following third-party services:

• Aladhan API — for prayer time calculations (no personal data is shared, only coordinates if location is enabled)
• Expo Push Notification Service — to deliver push notifications to your device

These services have their own privacy policies and we encourage you to review them.
privacy.notifications: Push notifications are optional and require your explicit permission. You can control which notifications you receive (prayer reminders, announcements, events) in the app settings. Notification preferences are stored on your device and can be changed at any time.
privacy.yourRights:
You have the right to:

• Access the personal data we hold about you
• Request correction of inaccurate data
• Request deletion of your account and associated data
• Withdraw consent for notifications at any time
• Export your data

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@salafimasjid.app.
privacy.children: Our app is suitable for all ages. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 without parental consent. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us.
privacy.changes: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected in the app with an updated date. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.contact: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at info@salafimasjid.app.
